blenderReference.authoredLightScaleReason: The isolated reference rig places and sizes its Area lights from the object radius, but Blender Area energy is total power. Scaling the 1000/500 W pair by 28 compensates for this asset's 58.49-unit radius relative to the 11.06-unit N03D calibration target.

browserContract.front: The col point attribute feeds the Principled base color without an invented brightness band.
browserContract.roughness: The rough point attribute is used directly when present; otherwise the extracted 0.5 fallback is retained.
browserContract.back: Geometry Backfacing selects the material's black Emission branch. WebGL zeros outgoing light on backfaces so a physical specular lobe cannot leak through the emission result; the camera-facing surface remains on the Principled branch.
browserContract.removedApproximation: The former generated-Z sine band altered diffuse color and roughness even though Blender routes the Wave texture into Bump and procedural coat fields instead.

remaining: Wave distortion, derivative Bump/bevel normals, and white-noise-driven coat fields remain separate front-facing material targets. They produce the dense authored layer-line relief visible in the scale-correct Blender reference.
interpretation: The 0.9922 silhouette IoU confirms camera and exact geometry alignment. The browser preserves the authored front color and has no 0.5-threshold disagreement, while its brighter mean and missing fine line relief localize the remaining residual to renderer energy calibration and the unimplemented Wave/Bump and procedural coat fields.
